prompt: A clean editorial magazine cover on an off-white studio background, designed like a premium illustrated automobile magazine. The main headline at the top is huge condensed blue sans-serif text reading {argument name="magazine title" default="AUTO ICON"}, with a small subtitle beneath it reading "THE ILLUSTRATED AUTOMOBILE MAGAZINE". In the top right, place small blue issue text reading {argument name="issue date" default="May 2026"} above a larger blue number line reading "No.128" with a thin underline. The central feature is a beautifully illustrated classic {argument name="car model" default="red Lancia Stratos"}, shown in a front three-quarter view facing left, low and wedge-shaped, bright glossy red paint, black roof spoiler, pop-up headlights raised, detailed vents on the hood, black grille, gold wheels, realistic tires, and subtle reflections and shadows on the floor. To the right of the car stands a slim anime-style {argument name="companion character" default="blue-haired girl"}, full body, facing left toward the car, short muted blue bob haircut with a small tied section in back, minimalist facial detail, white long-sleeve top, pale blue skirt, white socks, blue sneakers, and a blue shoulder bag, posed casually with one arm bent near her chest. Use a refined blend of soft cel-shaded anime illustration and realistic automotive rendering, with lots of negative space and elegant print-layout balance. Add large red Japanese cover text on the left in two lines reading {argument name="main cover line" default="赤いランチア・ストラトス"}, with a smaller blue Japanese subheading beneath it reading "伝説のラリーカーを、イラストで楽しむ。" Add another small blue line reading "特集 / CLASSIC SPORTS" and a handwritten-style light red note saying "with blue-haired girl". At the bottom left, include two blocks of small Japanese cover copy and a realistic barcode with tiny issue digits. Keep the overall aesthetic minimal, sophisticated, airy, and poster-like, with soft daylight shadows and a high-end Japanese magazine cover composition.
translatedPrompt: 一张在米白色摄影棚背景下的简洁编辑类杂志封面，设计风格如同高端汽车插画杂志。顶部的主标题为巨大的蓝色压缩无衬线字体，内容为 {argument name="magazine title" default="AUTO ICON"}，下方配有小型副标题“THE ILLUSTRATED AUTOMOBILE MAGAZINE”。在右上角，放置小型蓝色期号文本 {argument name="issue date" default="May 2026"}，其下方是一行带有细下划线的蓝色大号数字“No.128”。画面中心是一辆精美的经典 {argument name="car model" default="红色蓝旗亚 Stratos"} 插画，采用左侧前 45 度视角，车身低矮呈楔形，亮红色漆面，黑色车顶扰流板，弹出式大灯开启，引擎盖上有精细的通风口，黑色格栅，金色轮毂，逼真的轮胎，地面上有细腻的倒影和阴影。在汽车右侧站着一位身材苗条的动漫风格 {argument name="companion character" default="蓝发少女"}，全身像，面向左侧的汽车，留着柔和的蓝色短波波头，后脑勺扎着一小束头发，面部细节简约，身穿白色长袖上衣、浅蓝色短裙、白色短袜、蓝色运动鞋，背着蓝色单肩包，姿态随性，一只手臂弯曲靠近胸前。采用柔和的赛璐璐动漫插画与写实汽车渲染相结合的精致风格，保留大量留白，并保持优雅的印刷排版平衡。在左侧添加两行巨大的红色日文封面文字 {argument name="main cover line" default="赤いランチア・ストラトス"}，下方配有一行较小的蓝色日文副标题“伝説のラリーカーを、イラストで楽しむ。”。添加另一行蓝色小字“特集 / CLASSIC SPORTS”，以及一行手写风格的浅红色备注“with blue-haired girl”。在左下角，包含两块小型日文封面文案和一个带有微小期号数字的逼真条形码。整体美学保持极简、精致、通透且具有海报感，带有柔和的日光阴影和高端日系杂志封面的构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 经典汽车杂志插画封面：此提示词可生成一张风格时尚、带有日系元素的杂志封面，画面包含一辆红色经典跑车和一位动漫少女，非常适合用于编辑海报艺术或虚构出版物封面。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, anime, minimalist, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
